name: Kassi {FtM ver.}
description:
This is that one character from Legend Of Zelda apparently since I found this on E621 and it kinda reminded me of Mollie Macaw, So I had the idea of this being Mollie's relative like a cousin.. So I made this I guess.

This a relative of a transfem macaw named Mollie which happens to be transmasc and the polar opposite of Mollie Macaw but with fascinating looks of his pure charisma and short amount of femininity inside his masculinity, he's a handful but in the best way possible. He may not be part of the main crew or may not be a side character in the park of Indigo Park, but he sure is just a really nice dude that's related to his cousin Mollie.. He has major ADHD and Autism but still functions in society with his huge interests of the many things that he likes..
creator: QueenJan0r
